calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Mercy Hall, for Jason and Jill Kimbrough, Petitioners.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their position regarding the instant petition for fees. At the conclusion of discussion and after a brief recess, the subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Ramirez. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mercy Hall for petitioners Jill Kimbrough and Jason Kimbrough (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on First Account and Report of Trustees; Petition to Settle Account; to Decrease Bond; and to Fix and Allow Attorney Fees and Costs.

The Court noted that a supplemental report had been filed late the previous day and stated that additional time was needed to review.

The Court continued the matter to December 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Continued To Oct-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Continued To Aug-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mercy Hall for Jill Kimbrough and Jason Kimbrough, Trustees (via Zoom).

Ms. Hall reported that efforts to obtain signatures from both trustees on the petition were ongoing. One trustee had agreed to sign, but the other had expressed concerns regarding fees, leading to further discussions. To expedite the matter, Ms. Hall proposed a three-week continuance, with the condition that failure to have an accounting on file prior to the hearing would result in the trustees being required to appear before the court.

The court continued the matter to April 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. An Order to Appear shall be issued for trustees Jill Kimbrough and Jason Kimbrough to appear at the hearing. If the accounting is filed before April 8, 2025, the hearing will go off calendar, and their appearance will not be required.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mercy Hall for Jill Kimbrough and Jason Kimbrough, Trustees (via Zoom).

The Court noted that at the last hearing in December, counsel had indicated the petition was nearly ready for filing. Ms. Hall explained that the petition was completed and sent to the clients, but they only acknowledged receipt yesterday, and their signatures are still pending. She stated that they have been contacted to expedite the signing and expects to file the petition today or tomorrow.

The court continued the matter to March 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Feb-11-2025 Continued To Feb-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mercy Hall for Jill Kimbrough and Jason Kimbrough, Trustees (via Zoom).

The court requested a status update as to filing the first trust accounting. Ms. Hall stated that the accounting had been sent out for signatures and estimated their return within one week. The court noted a prior representation from December 17, 2024, indicating the accounting was completed but awaiting finalization. Ms. Hall explained that a staff member's time entries required correction to ensure accuracy before submission to the court.

The court continued the matter to February 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Continued To Feb-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mercy Hall for Jill Kimbrough and Jason Kimbrough, Trustees (via Zoom).

Counsel reported the accounting is ready and nearly finalized, pending completion of fee calculations. The court noted similar assurances were provided at the prior hearing on December 17th and expressed the need for timely submission. Counsel explained delays were due to a high volume of hearings in December and the absence of an associate. Counsel requested 30 days to finalize and file the accounting.

The court continued the matter to February 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for further status.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mercy Hall for Jill Kimbrough and Jason Kimbrough, Trustees (via Zoom).

Ms. Hall informed the court that the accounting is complete but requires final review and discussion with clients regarding certain transactions. Ms. Hall requested a continuance to finalize and file the accounting. The court continued the matter to January 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
